name: Chocolate Pie/Crisco
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Crisco Single Crust and do not bake it. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine granulated sugar, brown sugar, flour, corn syrup, Golden Crisco shortening, eggs, melted unsweetened chocolate, vanilla, and salt. Mix well. Fold in walnut pieces, shredded coconut, and chocolate chips. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie crust.
3. Place the pie on a baking sheet and bake at 450°F (230°C) for 10 minutes. Reduce oven temperature to 375°F (190°C). Continue baking for 40 to 45 minutes or until the filling is set in the center. If necessary, cover the edge with foil to prevent overbrowning. Allow the pie to cool to room temperature before serving. Makes: One 8-inch (20 cm) pie
